rulings.Case Title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. ATANACIA ARREOLA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, October 29, 2010, line 2, Amended Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption. DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. EXEMPTION CLAIMANT FAILS TO PROVIDE PROOF THAT THE EXEMPTION APPLIES, SUCH AS BANK STATEMENTS SHOWING THE SOURCE OF THE FUNDS IN THE ACCOUNT. CCP SECTION 703.580(b). =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA PEREZ et al VS. LOLMAN ENTERPRISES, INC., DBA LOLLI'S et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena For Gerber Alverenga
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, October 29, 2010, line 2, DEFENDANT LUIS SANCHEZ Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena For Gerber Alverenga. TO BE HEARD ON DISCOVERY CALENDAR NOVEMBER 1, 2010 AT 9:00AM (WITH LINE 3). GRANTED. ALVARENGA TO APPEAR FOR A DEPOSITION BY NOVEMBER 11, 2010. PLAINTIFFS' COUNSEL CLAIMS THAT HE DOES NOT REPRESENT ALVARENGA, BUT FILED OBJECTIONS TO THE SUBPOENA ON HIS BEHALF. ALVARENGA DID NOT FILE A PROTECTIVE ORDER OR OTHERWISE SEEK THROUGH ANY LEGAL MEANS TO BE EXCLUDED FROM THIS LAWSUIT. OBJECTIONS REGARDING PRIVILEGES OR PRIVACY MAY BE RAISED AT THE DEPOSITION, IN GOOD FAITH, DEPENDING ON THE QUESTIONS. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA PEREZ et al VS. LOLMAN ENTERPRISES, INC., DBA LOLLI'S et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Pltf To Respond To Form Interrogatories
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, October 29, 2010, line 3, DEFENDANT LUIS SANCHEZ Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Respond To Form Interrogatories. MEJIA SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES: GRANTED AS TO NUMBERS 6, 12, 13, 14, 18, 21 AND 25. DENIED AS TO REMAINDER. MEJIA REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS: PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PRODUCE A PRIVILEGE LOG. LOBATO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES: GRANTED AS TO NUMBERS 3, 4, 13, 14, AND 15. DENIED AS TO REMAINDER. LOBATO DOCUMENT REQUESTS: GRANTED AS TO 1, 5, 6, 7 AND 23. PLAINTIFF TO PRODUCE A PRIVILEGE LOG AS TO NUMBERS 3 AND 4. DENIED AS TO NUMBER 9. FURTHER RESPONSES TO ALL DISCOVERY DUE BY NOVEMBER 11. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS DENIED. [ALSO TO BE HEARD WITH LINE 2 ON LAW & MOTION CALENDAR, MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH DEPOSITION SUBPOENA.] =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: BOREL PRIVATE BANK & TRUST COMPANY VS. BURT HAMROL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Sanctions Against (1) Third Party John Warda And (2) Defts Burt Hamrol, Hamrol Development, Inc. And Customer Serviceing General Contracting, Inc., For Failing To Attend Depositions In Violation Of Court Orders
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, October 29, 2010, line 5, PLAINTIFF BOREL PRIVATE BANK & TRUST COMPANY'S Motion For Sanctions Against (1) Third Party John Warda And (2) Defendants Burt Hamrol, Hamrol Development, Inc. And Customer Serviceing General Contracting, Inc., For Failing To Attend Depositions In Violation Of Court Orders. GRANTED IN PART. WARDA AND HAMROL TO APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION BY 11/17. HAMROL'S DEPOSITION IS LIMITED TO ONE 8 HOUR DAY WITH TIME FOR LUNCH AND SHORT BREAKS. ALL SANCTIONS REQUESTS ARE DENIED. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: BOREL PRIVATE BANK & TRUST COMPANY VS. BURT HAMROL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Mtn To Quash Subpoena, And For A Protective Order Re James Warda'S Deposition ; Request For Sanctions Against Plaintiff'S Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, October 29, 2010, line 5, OTHER JAMES WARDA, CPA Amended Motion To Quash Subpoena, And For A Protective Order Re James Warda's Deposition; Request For Sanctions Against Plaintiff's Counsel. DENIED. WARDA'S DEPOSITION TO OCCUR by 11/17. BOREL CAN SEEK A TRIAL CONTINUANCE OR RELIEF FROM THE CCP SECTION 437c REQUIREMENT THAT A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BE HEARD AT LEAST 30 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL. ALL SANCTIONS REQUESTS ARE DENIED. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: BOREL PRIVATE BANK & TRUST COMPANY VS. BURT HAMROL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion To Compel Depositions Of John Conover And Christopher Greene And For A Protective Order, Case Management Order And Discovery Referee
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, October 29, 2010, line 5, DEFENDANT BURT HAMROL, CUSTOMER SERVICE GENERAL CONTRACTING, INC., HAMROL DEVELOPMENT, INC.'S Motion To Compel Depositions Of John Conover And Christopher Greene And For A Protective Order, Case Management Order And Discovery Referee. GRANTED IN PART. GREENE TO APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION BY 11/17. GREENE'S DEPOSITION IS LIMITED TO ONE 8 HOUR DAY WITH TIME FOR LUNCH AND SHORT BREAKS. DEPOSITION IS DENIED AS TO CONOVER. APPOINTMENT OF DISCOVERY REFEREE IS GRANTED. THE PARTIES TO SHARE COSTS EQUALLY, AND MEET AND CONFER AND PROPOSE 3 CANDIDATES TO THE COURT BY 11/5, UNLESS THE PARTIES AGREE TO THE REFEREE. PARTIES TO MAKE EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR APPOINTMENT OF REFEREE BY 11/5. ALL SANCTIONS REQUESTS ARE DENIED. =(302/CWW)
